interface: Kubernetes batch/v1 Job list+watch over HTTP JSON (stable core protocol; researched against v1.36 documentation and the official OpenAPI specification)

list.initial_and_recovery_params: no resourceVersion parameter: unset resourceVersion means Most Recent semantics (consistent quorum-read snapshot)

metadata.resourceVersion: the snapshot version the next watch starts from

params.resourceVersion: the JobList metadata.resourceVersion of the last list, thereafter the metadata.resourceVersion of the last event or bookmark object

watch.stream: chunked transfer; one JSON WatchEvent {"type": ..., "object": ...} per newline; a frame may arrive split across reads
watch.bookmark_rule: a BOOKMARK object is a Job carrying only metadata.resourceVersion; it advances the resume version and is never delivered to the sink
watch.clean_eof_rule: when the server ends the stream without an error the client starts a new watch from the current resume version, without relisting and without emitting events

surfaces: HTTP 410 response to the watch request itself
ERROR watch event whose object is a Status with code 410
expired.recovery: relist WITHOUT a resourceVersion parameter, diff the fresh list against the known set keyed by metadata.uid, then watch from the fresh list's resourceVersion

relist_diff.added: uid not previously known -> ADDED, in fresh-list order
relist_diff.modified: known uid whose metadata.resourceVersion changed -> MODIFIED, in fresh-list order
relist_diff.unchanged: known uid with an identical resourceVersion -> no event
relist_diff.deleted: previously known uid absent from the fresh list -> DELETED carrying the last known Job state, emitted after the adds/modifies, ordered by job name ascending

errors.client_rule: non-2xx responses and ERROR frames with code != 410 decode into *APIError{Code, Reason, Message}; ERROR frames with code 410 trigger the expired recovery instead

terminal_rule: a Job is terminal when a status.conditions entry has type Complete or Failed with status "True"; Suspended and SuccessCriteriaMet conditions never count
